title: Terrarian Hearts
description: Make the Hearts in the HUD look like in Terraria, while mantaining the Minecraft flavor
body:
# Terrarian Hearts

Terraria-like hearts while keeping Minecraft's style, contains both "Classic" and "Fancy" alt versions. Only versions 1.20 and above can be used aongside resourcepacks that change the HUD without both interfering.

_(check gallery for the comparison)_

### Disclaimer
I made this pack to use with mods that remove the hunger system, so i have no plans on changing anything other than the hearts anytime soon

## More Texturepacks
